docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,003.91 FILED BY GOLDHAMMER LEWIS D DBA GOLDHAMMER ACCOCIATES INC AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ GERY DBA SAN FRANCISCO DEVELOPMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ GERY DBA SAN FRANCISCO DEVELOPMENT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-30-1992, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-09-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDHAMMER LEWIS D DBA GOLDHAMMER ACCOCIATES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ GERY DBA SAN FRANCISCO DEVELOPMENT $4,003.91 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,051.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ GERY DBA SAN FRANCISCO DEVELOPMENT
